tweets.text: Great to join Andrea Hazell in Scarborough-Guildwood as she runs for re-election as MPP! Andrea brings the kind of energy needed at Queen’s Park to amplify the voices and concerns of her constituents. Looking forward to seeing her continue to deliver for the community! #onpoli @AndreaHazelll
tweets.author: Michael Coteau

tweets.text: Great attending the Toronto Educational Opportunity Fund Lunar New Year event to help raise money for student nutrition programs. Thank you, Toronto Education Workers/Local 4400, for your dedication to students. Always great seeing everyone! #StudentNutrition #TOpoli
tweets.author: Michael Coteau

tweets.text: Mike Harris’s cuts to social services, housing, and healthcare pushed Ontario’s most vulnerable deeper into crisis. Pierre Poilievre is singing the same tune: tax cuts for the rich, austerity for the rest. We can’t afford another era of cruel, short-sighted policies. #cdnpoli
tweets.author: Michael Coteau

tweets.text: Pierre Poilievre’s playbook feels eerily familiar: tax cuts for the wealthy, slashing public services, and a ‘common sense’ branding. Looks like he’s channeling Mike Harris’s divisive and damaging legacy. We’ve seen this movie before, and we know how it ends. #cdnpoli
tweets.author: Michael Coteau
